name: Members of the H3K4 trimethylation complex regulate lifespan in a germline-dependent manner in C. elegans
short_name: H3K4me3 complex and C. elegans lifespan
summary: A Nature study showing that deficiencies in H3K4 trimethylation complex members ASH-2, WDR-5, and SET-2 extend C. elegans lifespan through germline-dependent mechanisms.
